title: citrus × limonia var. limetta
intro: Citrus × limonia var. limetta, also known as the limetta or sweet lime, is a citrus plant that is a natural hybrid between a sour orange and a lemon, characterized by its sweet and acidic taste. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, making it effective in treating various health issues such as fever, digestive problems, and skin infections. The health benefits of the limetta plant include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve digestion, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies and wellness products. The plant is often prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, juices, and oils, which can be used to make remedies for colds, sore throats, and respiratory issues.
